description: User shares a hobby / interest with light enthusiasm. The lifeform should mirror with curiosity in acquaintance_building, NOT escalate to emotional support or commit to problem-solving steps.

turns.user_input: I have been getting into ceramics on the weekends. Wedging clay is weirdly meditative.
Most of my pieces still come out lopsided but I do not really care. It is the focus that I like.
Have you ever encountered hobbies people pick up just to slow themselves down?
